ddls:
CREATE TABLE "marine_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marine feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the marine feature (e.g., Blue mussel beds) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "habitat_type" TEXT /* Type of habitat the feature belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the feature (e.g., monitored, endangered) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the feature's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the feature's location */,
  "depth_range_min" REAL /* Minimum depth of the feature's habitat */,
  "depth_range_max" REAL /* Maximum depth of the feature's habitat */,
  "last_survey_date" TEXT /* Date of the last survey conducted */,
  "survey_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of surveys (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date when the current status was last updated */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status (e.g., endangered, vulnerable) */,
  "description_source" TEXT /* Source of the description (e.g., research paper, field notes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the marine feature */,
  "record_type" TEXT /* Type of record (e.g., Area, Count) */,
  "record_value" INTEGER /* Value of the record */,
  "records_included" INTEGER /* Total records included in analysis */,
  "percentage_included" REAL /* Percentage of records included in analysis */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., satellite, field survey) */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to collect the data */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the record (e.g., 0.9 for 90%) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_records_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES marine_features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "habitat_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each habitat type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the habitat type (e.g., Benthic, Pelagic) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the habitat type */,
  "depth_range_min" REAL /* Minimum depth of the habitat type */,
  "depth_range_max" REAL /* Maximum depth of the habitat type */,
  "temperature_range_min" REAL /* Minimum temperature range of the habitat */,
  "temperature_range_max" REAL /* Maximum temperature range of the habitat */,
  "salinity_range_min" REAL /* Minimum salinity range of the habitat */,
  "salinity_range_max" REAL /* Maximum salinity range of the habitat */,
  "primary_species" TEXT /* Primary species found in the habitat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monitoring_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the monitoring site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries regarding the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  "depth_range_min" REAL /* Minimum depth of the site */,
  "depth_range_max" REAL /* Maximum depth of the site */,
  "temperature_range_min" REAL /* Minimum temperature range of the site */,
  "temperature_range_max" REAL /* Maximum temperature range of the site */,
  "salinity_range_min" REAL /* Minimum salinity range of the site */,
  "salinity_range_max" REAL /* Maximum salinity range of the site */,
  "primary_species" TEXT /* Primary species found at the site */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of the site (e.g., coastal, deep sea) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Areas of expertise of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the access */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the marine feature */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., CSV, PDF) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the data file was uploaded */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "file_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the file */,
  "file_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for easy search */,
  "file_status" TEXT /* Status of the file (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "file_format_version" TEXT /* Version of the file format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_file_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES marine_features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the marine feature */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* Path to the image file */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "image_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "image_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for easy search */,
  "image_status" TEXT /* Status of the image (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_images_image_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_images_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES marine_features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the research project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* Sources of funding for the project */,
  "project_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for easy search */,
  "project_outcomes" TEXT /* Expected outcomes of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_principal_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project */,
  "assignment_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the assignment */,
  "assignment_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the assignment */,
  "assignment_status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "assignment_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_assignments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)
